revision.text:
[[ca:Fujiwara no Ishi]][[en:Fujiwara no Ishi]][[fa:فوجیوارا نو ایشی (امپراتریس)]][[fr:Fujiwara no Ishi]][[id:Fujiwara no Ishi]][[ja:藤原威子]][[ko:후지와라노 이시 (1000년)]][[sv:Fujiwara no Ishi]][[th:ฟูจิวาระ โนะ อิชิ]][[zh:藤原威子]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=1000|death_date=1036|gender={{ill|female|qid=Q6581072|1=Female (gender)}}|nationality={{ill|Japan|qid=Q17|1=Japan}}|occupation={{ill|empress consort|qid=Q7723211|1=Empress consort}}|title={{ill|Empress of Japan|qid=Q595038|1=Empress of Japan}}|spouse={{ill|Go-Ichijō|qid=Q374087|1=Emperor Go-Ichijō}}|children={{ill|Kaoruko-naishinnō|qid=Q7244663|1=Princess Kaoruko}}; {{ill|Shōshi-naishinnō|qid=Q7244825|1=Princess Shōshi (1027–1105)}}|father={{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qid=Q433133|1=Fujiwara no Michinaga}}|mother={{ill|Minamoto no Rinshi|qid=Q11563997|1=Minamoto no Rinshi}}|relatives={{ill|Chōshin|qid=Q11651502|1=Chōshin}}; {{ill|Fujiwara no Akinobu|qid=Q11623643|1=Fujiwara no Akinobu}}; {{ill|Fujiwara no Kanshi|qid=Q15645727|1=Fujiwara no Kanshi}}; {{ill|Fujiwara no Kenshi|qid=Q5507521|1=Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)}}; {{ill|Fujiwara no Kishi|qid=Q11623137|1=Fujiwara no Kishi}}; {{ill|Fujiwara no Norimichi|qid=Q3090649|1=Fujiwara no Norimichi}}; {{ill|Fujiwara no Shōshi|qid=Q901949|1=Empress Shōshi}}; {{ill|Fujiwara no Sonshi|qid=Q15838925|1=Fujiwara no Sonshi}}; {{ill|Fujiwara no Tadaie|qid=Q5507543|1=Fujiwara no Tadaie}}; {{ill|Fujiwara no Yorimichi|qid=Q1370620|1=Fujiwara no Yorimichi}}; {{ill|Fujiwara no Yorimune|qid=Q10514093|1=Fujiwara no Yorimune}}; {{ill|Fujiwara no Yoshinobu|qid=Q11623489|1=Fujiwara no Yoshinobu}}|family={{ill|Midō-ryū|qid=Q11488901|1=Midō-ryū}}|religion={{ill|Buddhism|qid=Q748|1=Buddhism}}|native_name=藤原威子}} {{family name hatnote|Fujiwara|lang=Japanese}} {{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|藤原威子|date=November 2011}} {{Infobox royalty | consort = yes | name = Fujiwara no Ishi
藤原威子 | succession = {{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|qid=Q595038|lt=Empress of Japan|1=Empress of Japan}} | reign = November 16, 1018 – September 4, 1036 | birth_date = {{Birth date|1000|02|01}} | death_date = {{death date and age|1036|9|28|1000|02|01}} | spouse = {{ill|Emperor Go-Ichijō|en|Emperor Go-Ichijō|qid=Q374087|lt=Emperor Go-Ichijō|1=Emperor Go-Ichijō}} | issue = {{ill|Princess Shōshi (1027–1105)|en|Princess Shōshi (1027–1105)|qid=Q7244825|lt=Princess Shōshi|1=Princess Shōshi (1027–1105)}}
{{ill|Princess Kaoruko|en|Princess Kaoruko|qid=Q7244663|lt=Princess Kaoruko|1=Princess Kaoruko}} | house = [[Fujiwara clan]] (by birth)
{{ill|Imperial House of Japan|en|Imperial House of Japan|qid=Q909452|lt=Imperial House of Japan|1=Imperial House of Japan}} (by marriage) | father = {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|en|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qid=Q433133|lt=Fujiwara no Michinaga|1=Fujiwara no Michinaga}} | mother = Minamoto no Michiko }} '''Fujiwara no Ishi''' (藤原威子) (999–1036) was the {{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|qid=Q595038|lt=empress consort|1=Empress of Japan}} of {{ill|Emperor Go-Ichijō|en|Emperor Go-Ichijō|qid=Q374087|lt=Emperor Go-Ichijō|1=Emperor Go-Ichijō}} of Japan. == Biography == She was the third daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|en|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qid=Q433133|lt=Fujiwara no Michinaga|1=Fujiwara no Michinaga}}. At the manor, she was trained by her older brother, Yorimichi, to be the empress. In 1018, at the age of nineteen, she married her ten-year-old nephew the Emperor and became Empress (''Chugu''), and thus the third of her sisters to become Empresses in succession, all in marriages arranged by their father the regent. John Whitney Hall, Delmer Myers Brown, Donald H. Shively, William H. McCullough, Marius B. Jansen, Peter Duus, Kōzō Yamamura, ''[https://books.google.com/books?id=eiTWWfoyuyAC&dq=Fujiwara+no+Kenshi+1027+Sanj%C5%8D&pg=PA69 The Cambridge History of Japan, Volym 2]'' Shoshi was the Grand Empress Dowager, Kenshi was the Empress Dowager, she was the Empress and her younger sister, Kishi was the Crown Princess. Kenshi and Kishi died soon, and these tragedies leave deep wounds on her family. She was reportedly embarrassed to marry the emperor because she was nine years his senior, and because he was her nephew. However, the marriage was arranged mainly for matters of politics and status, and she was expected to fulfill a ceremonial role. Even her brothers were reportedly surprised when the emperor chose to consummate the marriage, and it resulted in two daughters. ;Issue: * Imperial Princess Akiko/''{{ill|Princess Shōshi (1027–1105)|en|Princess Shōshi (1027–1105)|qid=Q7244825|lt=Shōshi|1=Princess Shōshi (1027–1105)}}'' (章子内親王) (Nijō-In, 二条院) (1026–1105), Empress (''chūgū'') to {{ill|Emperor Go-Reizei|en|Emperor Go-Reizei|qid=Q356060|lt=Emperor Go-Reizei|1=Emperor Go-Reizei}} * Imperial {{ill|Princess Kaoruko|en|Princess Kaoruko|qid=Q7244663|lt=Princess Kaoruko|1=Princess Kaoruko}}/''Keishi'' (馨子内親王) (1029–1093), Empress (''chūgū'') to [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjo|Emperor Go-Sanjō]] On September 4, the same year of Emperor Go-Ichijō's passing, she took tonsure as a Buddhist nun. She died two days later at the age of 38.{{cite web |title=藤原威子：摄政藤原道长的四女，后一条天皇中宫 |url=http://www.qulishi.com/article/201812/308568.html |website=趣历史 |access-date=2019-10-13 |language=zh}} ==Notes== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before= {{ill|Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|en|Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|qid=Q5507521|lt=Fujiwara no Kenshi|1=Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)}} | title={{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|qid=Q595038|lt=Empress consort of Japan|1=Empress of Japan}} | after={{ill|Princess Teishi|en|Princess Teishi|qid=Q7244846|lt=Princess Teishi|1=Princess Teishi}} | years=1018–1036}} {{s-end}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Japan-royal-stub}} [[en:Fujiwara no Ishi]] [[ca:Fujiwara no Ishi]] [[fa:فوجیوارا نو ایشی (امپراتریس)]] [[fr:Fujiwara no Ishi]] [[id:Fujiwara no Ishi]] [[ja:藤原威子]] [[ko:후지와라노 이시]] [[sv:Fujiwara no Ishi]] [[th:ฟูจิวาระ โนะ อิชิ]] [[zh:藤原威子]] {{wikidata link|Q5507516}} [[Category:1036 deaths]] [[Category:11th-century Buddhist nuns]] [[Category:999 births]] [[Category:Deaths from smallpox]] [[Category:Deaths_in_childbirth]] [[Category:Fujiwara clan]] [[Category:Japanese Buddhist nuns]] [[Category:Japanese empresses consort]] [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
